arts.ttl: Spotted: Leeds teen duo Chadwick, McDonald impress
arts.sum: Leeds United’s U21s claimed victory over Aldershot in the National League Cup on Tuesday night thanks to two more goals from Rhys Chadwick, either side of an Ollie Pickles strike. It was the same old story for Leeds’ U21 side this season as talented 18-year-old midfielder Rhys Chadwick continued to add to his stunning goal tally this season with a brace.

arts.ttl: Ethan Ampadu sends ‘confidence’ message to Leeds United diehards after Portsmouth defeat
arts.sum: Ethan Ampadu insists he and his Leeds United teammates have “full confidence” that they will earn promotion to the Premier League amid a close race for the top two Championship spots. Three of United ’s four Championship defeats this season have come when Ampadu has been out injured.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss Alex Neil wary of potential Leeds response after Portsmouth defeat
arts.sum: The Millwall head coach knows his side will have to be at their best to take something from the game but is confident in their ability to compete. “Leeds are an outstanding team, they are competing for the title, and they have been the best team in the league this season when I have watched them.”

arts.ttl: Leeds United's final Championship points tally predicted as promotion truth emerges
arts.sum: After dropping five points across their last two matches, a fresh prediction has emerged for Leeds' chances of securing promotion to the Premier League. A fresh prediction has emerged for Leeds United's chances of securing promotion to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have a glaring problem that has no obvious solution
arts.sum: The number 10 issue has become more glaring in recent Leeds United games, Brenden Aaronson often leaving the pitch - and supporters - frustrated. Daniel Farke has experimented with Manor Solomon, Wilfried Gnonto and Joel Piroe in the number 10 slot when Aaronson has been withdrawn or rested in FA Cup games.

arts.ttl: Leeds’ rivals all draw 1-1, two red cards, mass scuffles
arts.sum: Sheffield United and Burnley both had the opportunity to lay down a marker to Leeds on Tuesday night by claiming home victories against Bristol City and West Brom respectively. Leeds United look like they’ve finally been handed something of a favour by others in the division, as Sheffield United, Burnley and Sunderland all drew 1-1 on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Millwall amid caution over ‘knocks and bruises’
arts.sum: Patrick Bamford, who suffered a hamstring injury in January, partially returned to team training last week but Farke has always underlined how he would need a few sessions to get back up to speed before being reintroduced to the matchday squad. Daniel Farke expects to have the same Leeds United squad that travelled to Portsmouth available for Wednesday’s home clash with Millwall, despite a few bumps and bruises from the weekend.
